rationale: The two paper notes show substantive overlap: the citing study analyzes dynamic effects of team personnel investment on both performance (winning) and demand (ticket utilization), while the cited study models dynamic payroll/talent investment effects on winning and attendance in professional sports. That makes the cited work a plausible mechanism/theory or comparison source rather than a clearly incidental mention. Although the raw match is only a single DOI reference with no local citation text, this is not safely droppable as obvious mention-only.
